title: EpiNet — the Epistemic Network toolkit: a reproducible, leakage-aware evaluation workflow for graph-shaped tabular data
description: EpiNet is a research/education toolkit for graph-shaped datasets. It computes graph features, evaluates an outcome model with discrimination and calibration metrics, a label-permutation null, and community-aware splitting, scores how contestable each nearest-centroid call is (closed-form flip-distance), and reconstructs its standardization and contestability spine from per-site aggregates behind a fail-closed governance gate. It is a demonstrator, not clinical decision support.
